objective: Verify the installed runtime issue-lane guard, record no-mutation worktree hygiene evidence, and document safe issue-lane startup.
scope_boundary: Record a no-mutation audit of local hldpro-governance worktrees.
Sync and verify the installed global branch/worktree guard.
Capture live installed-hook proof for blocked and allowed issue worktree command forms.
Document the safe issue-lane startup sequence in the org repo intake runbook.
out_of_scope: Starting item 5 or any backlog implementation lane.
Mutating issue #398 or any other active session lane.
Changing GitHub org or repository rulesets.
research_summary: Issue #393 added execution-scope lane ownership and issue #397 moved the guard earlier to PreToolUse worktree creation. This slice verifies the installed runtime hook path and documents the operator startup sequence so the prior #391 lane-invasion pattern stays closed.

sprints.name: Runtime lane guard proof
sprints.goal: Prove the installed global hook blocks unclaimed issue worktree creation while preserving explicit bootstrap and claimed-scope paths.
tasks: Create issue-backed PDCAR, structured plan, and lane-claimed execution scope.
Capture worktree hygiene status without mutating sibling roots.
Sync the global hook to the repo hook when hash drift exists.
Run installed-hook negative and positive controls.
Add the issue-lane startup snippet to the runbook.
Update backlog/progress mirrors and closeout evidence.
acceptance_criteria: Worktree hygiene audit is recorded without deletion or cleanup.
Global hook sync evidence records before and after hashes.
Installed-hook proof covers blocked unmarked issue worktree creation.
Installed-hook proof covers explicit planning bootstrap.
Installed-hook proof covers matching claimed scope.
Installed-hook proof covers mismatched claimed scope rejection.
Installed-hook proof covers allowed non-issue worktree creation.
Runbook documents the safe issue-lane startup sequence.
Execution-scope, Local CI, and GitHub checks pass before merge.

specialist_reviews.focus: Verify the installed hook path and keep cleanup evidence separate from mutations.
specialist_reviews.summary: The agent pool was full, so the review was performed locally against the repo hook, installed global hook, and sibling worktree state. Cleanup recommendations are evidence-only and must not mutate another lane.

alternate_model_review.summary: Installed-hook controls exercise the runtime PreToolUse path directly. The evidence does not create or delete worktrees.

execution_handoff.approved_scope_summary: Issue #400 may update runbook/backlog/progress docs plus issue-specific planning, scope, validation, and closeout artifacts.
execution_handoff.next_execution_step: Run installed-hook proof, execution-scope validation, Local CI, GitHub checks, and merge.

material_deviation_rules: Do not clean, delete, or reset sibling worktrees in this issue.
Do not start backlog item 5 from this lane.
Treat issue #398 and all non-#400 issue worktrees as separate lanes.
Do not claim runtime protection from docs alone; preserve installed-hook command evidence.
